name: Artemy Burakh (Haruspex)
description:
🔪🩸||Harupex, Ripper, Menhku, Butcher||🩸🔪
A choice must be made, save the town or preserve the magic of what once was, and Artemy turns to the steppe to clear his mind.

[Set before The Diurnal or Nocturnal endings]

{Total tokens: 4985 tokens. Permanent: 3534 tokens}
